Name: BLM Owyhee Field Office
Description: Bureau of Land Management Owyhee Field Office. Lead agency for DOI-BLM-ID-B030-2019-0014-EA.

Name: Sam Uhler and David Smith - Carrie Placer Mine
Description: Permit applicants for Carrie Placer Mine Plan of Operations. Holders of placer gold mining claim on 15 acres of BLM-administered land adjacent to Jordan Creek Owyhee County Idaho. Case IDI-38709.

Name: Idaho Conservation League
Description: Environmental advocacy organization. Active commenter on BLM Owyhee Field Office sage-grouse and riparian projects. Plaintiff on prior 9th Circuit suction dredge NEPA cases.

Name: Office of Species Conservation
Description: Idaho state agency. Reviews sage-grouse ARMPA conformance determinations for BLM projects in Idaho.

Name: Shoshone-Paiute Tribes of the Duck Valley Reservation
Description: Federally recognized tribe. Section 106 NHPA government-to-government consultation required for BLM undertakings in Owyhee County Idaho.
